Home › About

Transparency · About

About this guide

Central Florida Restaurant Grades is an independent guide built to answer one question Florida makes surprisingly hard: is this restaurant clean? The state inspects every restaurant but never grades them, and the reports are scattered across a public database few diners ever open. We pull those public records together, score them by a consistent published method, and pair them with dietary options and diner ratings so you can decide where to eat with full information.

This site is run by [YOUR NAME / ORG]. [One or two honest sentences on why you built it.] We’re not affiliated with the State of Florida or DBPR. Questions, corrections, or partnership inquiries: [CONTACT EMAIL].

How we grade Data & sources

Central Florida Restaurants

Restaurant health inspection grades, dietary options, and diner ratings across Central Florida. Inspection data from Florida DBPR public records.
